nasb.text: When Jesus had finished giving instructions to His twelve disciples, He departed from there to teach and preach in their cities.

esv.text: When Jesus had finished instructing his twelve disciples, he went on from there to teach and preach in their cities.

cnv.text: 耶穌吩咐完了十二門徒，就離開那裡，在各城裡教導傳道。

ccb.text: 耶稣嘱咐完十二个门徒，就离开那里，到附近的城镇传道和教导人。

csbs.text: 当耶稣吩咐完了他的十二个门徒，就离开了那里，到各城镇去传道、教导人。
